summary: Short clip filmed by pointing a phone at a television screen. The screen shows Trump in a dark blue suit and tie standing and raising a stemmed glass in a toast against an amber-lit backdrop. Fox News lower-third banners read 'BREAKING NEWS' and 'NOW: TRUMP GIVES TOAST AT STATE BANQUET' over a 'FOX NEWS ALERT' bar, with an on-screen clock reading 6:35 PM. The tweet text says he is toasting President Xi Jinping.

script.scene: TV screen showing Trump in a blue suit raising a glass to toast; chyron 'TRUMP GIVES TOAST AT STATE BANQUET,' clock 6:35 PM.
